summary: The main scenario begins as the barrier is destroyed by Surfehd, prompting the Rebel General Alexander to unleash his undead forces. Meanwhile, the protagonist arrives at the fortress with his informant, Jenny, a player embedded within the rebel army. He confronts a rebel commander known as the Dark Knight, revealing his identity as Lebron's disciple and engaging him in combat.
key_moments: The barrier is shattered, signaling the start of the main scenario.
Alexander commands his forces to turn knights into undead.
The protagonist encounters a rebel Dark Knight commander and begins a battle.
